name: notilens
description: Send alerts to NotiLens from any script, app, or AI agent — task lifecycle events, errors, completions, and metric tracking.
author: notilens

skills.description: Generate a unique run ID (run_{unix_ms}_{hex4}) to correlate all events from the same task execution. Call once at task start and include in meta.run_id on every event.
Send a notification to NotiLens. Pass name (source), event, message, and optional options (type, image_url, open_url, download_url, tags, meta). Title is auto-generated.
Track any custom event (e.g. order.placed, deploy.started). Title is auto-generated. Type and meta are optional.
Fire task.queued when a task is placed in a queue before a worker picks it up.
Fire task.started when execution begins. Include queue_ms in meta if the task was queued first.
Fire task.progress at meaningful checkpoints during a long task. Include rows_done, percent, tokens_used, or other metrics in meta.
Fire task.paused when the task is pausing (e.g. rate limit, waiting on I/O). Include pause_count and wait_reason in meta.
Fire task.waiting when the task is blocked on an external resource. Include wait_count and wait_reason in meta.
Fire task.resumed after a pause or wait ends. Include pause_ms or wait_ms in meta.
Fire task.retry when the task is being retried. Pass the current retry number (1-based) as retryCount.
Fire task.loop when repeating the same step. Pass the current loop count. Backend ML handles detection.
Fire task.error for a non-fatal error — task continues after this. Include error_count and last_error in meta.
Fire task.completed when a task finishes successfully. Include total_duration_ms, active_ms, and custom metrics in meta.
Fire task.failed when a task fails and will not be retried. Include retry_count, error_count, last_error, and total_duration_ms in meta.
Fire task.timeout when a task exceeds its time limit. Include total_duration_ms and time_limit_ms in meta.
Fire task.cancelled when a task is cancelled before completion.
Fire task.stopped when a task is stopped intentionally (not an error).
Fire task.terminated when a task is forcibly terminated.
Fire input.required when a human decision is needed to continue. Pass openUrl to link to an approval UI.
Fire input.approved when a human approves the request.
Fire input.rejected when a human rejects the request.
Fire output.generated when output is produced (file, report, result). Pass download_url, open_url, or image_url in meta.
Fire output.failed when expected output could not be produced.
